## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution

What do you want to happen?

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Which v4 plan phase does it touch?

- [ ] Phase 0
- [ ] Phase 1
- [ ] Phase 2
- [ ] Phase 3
- [ ] Phase 4
- [ ] Phase 5
- [ ] Cross-cutting

## Does it preserve the v3 invariants?

- [ ] Named Vectors `text_vec(768) + image_vec(512)`
- [ ] Single worker indexer
- [ ] Memory never forgotten
- [ ] Never auto-move files
- [ ] Local-first only
- [ ] Violates one — please explain why

## Additional context

Anything else (diagrams, mockups, related work).
